case_title: GANZ MITCHELL et al VS NEWCOMB BRENDA WILCOX

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT NEWCOMB BRENDA WILCOX IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT GANZ MITCHELL HOWELL ROBERT B. CROSS COMPLAINT FAILED TO SUSTAIN THE BURDEN OF PROOF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF
REFUND OF $408.00 SENT TO ROBERT HOWELL/MITCHEL GANZ WARRANT # 560-0013646.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $700.00 FILED BY GANZ MITCHELL HOWELL ROBERT B. AS TO DEFENDANT NEWCOMB BRENDA WILCOX ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-26-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NEWCOMB BRENDA WILCOX
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,300.00 FILED BY NEWCOMB BRENDA WILCOX AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT GANZ MITCHELL HOWELL ROBERT B. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-26-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO MITCHELL GANZ RETURNED NOT SIGNED BY ADDRESSEE.
POS ON SUBPOENA TO HERB DONALDSON FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GANZ MITCHELL HOWELL ROBERT B. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEWCOMB BRENDA WILCOX $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $408.00, NOTHING IN THE SECURITY DEP, PLFT FAILED TO OBTAIN THE BURDEN OF PROOF PLFT SUSTAINED BURDEN OF PROOF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
